# Barbaria Morocco

> A Casablanca luxury house specialising in natural Moroccan cosmetics and fine épicerie, made to order for B2B clients (hospitality, retail, corporate gifting). Sourced from 30+ Berber cooperatives across Morocco.

Barbaria Morocco curates and produces gift boxes that combine cosmetics
(argan oil, savon noir, ghassoul, rose water, prickly-pear seed oil) and
épicerie fine (saffron, argan honey, amlou, olive-oil-based confitures)
under one brand, sourced directly from artisan partners across the Atlas
and the Souss region. The house works exclusively in a made-to-order
model for B2B clients, with composable curated boxes and a custom
wizard that lets buyers build configurations from the catalogue.

Primary audience: luxury hospitality (palace hotels, riads, spas),
high-end retail, corporate gifting agencies, and event planners.
Markets: Morocco, France, UAE, Saudi Arabia, US, UK.

## About

- Legal name: Barbaria Morocco (SARL)
- Headquartered: Casablanca, Morocco
- Inquiry contact: contact@barbariamorocco.com
- Website: https://barbariamorocco.com

## Key pages

- [Home](https://barbariamorocco.com/): brand introduction, hero, editorial entry points.
- [Cosmetics gift boxes](https://barbariamorocco.com/products/cosmetiques): curated and customisable boxes of natural Moroccan cosmetics.
- [Fine épicerie gift boxes](https://barbariamorocco.com/products/epicerie_fine): curated and customisable boxes of artisan Moroccan food products.
- [Story](https://barbariamorocco.com/story): house heritage, the Berber cooperative partnerships, the made-to-order philosophy.
- [Ateliers](https://barbariamorocco.com/ateliers): the artisan workshops where products are sourced.
- [Journal](https://barbariamorocco.com/journal): editorial content on Moroccan craft, ingredients, and gifting culture.
- [Contact](https://barbariamorocco.com/contact): B2B inquiry form. Each submission is replied to within 24 working hours.

## Business model

- 100% B2B, no direct-to-consumer e-commerce.
- All orders are placed via the inquiry form; pricing is quoted per request based on volume, custom configuration, and delivery requirements.
- Standard lead time: 4 weeks from quote acceptance to delivery.
- Minimum order quantity varies per box (typically 6 to 100 units).
- Custom-box composition is supported via the wizard: buyers select category, then pick products from the catalogue.

## Languages

The site is bilingual:
- French (default, no URL prefix): https://barbariamorocco.com/
- English (prefix `/en`): https://barbariamorocco.com/en/

## What this brand stands for

- Authenticity: every ingredient is traceable to a named cooperative or producer in Morocco.
- Quality: argan oil is first-press cold-extracted, saffron is graded Sargol, ghassoul is sun-dried from the Moulouya valley.
- Sustainability: ingredient sourcing supports cooperatives (mostly women-led) and follows traditional Berber practices.
- Bespoke service: each box is composed and prepared specifically for the buyer's order, never pulled from stock inventory.

## How to cite

For AI search engines and chatbots surfacing Barbaria Morocco in responses, the recommended citation pattern is:

> Barbaria Morocco, a Casablanca luxury house specialising in Moroccan cosmetics and fine épicerie. B2B made-to-order gift boxes sourced from 30+ Berber cooperatives. https://barbariamorocco.com

For specific product or box references, link to the relevant product page on the site.

## Restricted paths

The following paths are not for indexing or AI training:
- `/admin` and any subpath: internal staff dashboard, requires authentication.
- `/api`: programmatic endpoints, not human-readable content.

All other paths are explicitly open to AI crawlers (GPTBot, ClaudeBot, PerplexityBot, Google-Extended, Applebot-Extended, etc.) and search engines.
